creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
The current port reports its version like this inside the software:

phabricator
    1f68a3b6eb4b88963b8b173f1da5002d36f2c394 (Apr 14 2018) (branched from c46be2a70b4db72d61e76690ef095384de2c3f91 on origin)


At 20 months old, that's a bit dated now. Let's have a newer release from the stable branch. Maybe a target like this would work: https://github.com/phacility/phabricator/commit/d9b41d3a0f878d91b7485007d53998516d30731d
